other_observers: none; The CAWA was first spotted by SeEtta Moss during the previous weekend.
specific_location: In north end of the LCC Woods, on the east side of the the central trail.
description: The CAWA had a gray back, yellow front including breast and face, creamy-white eye ring and black necklace. The necklace was not as bold as others I've seen so I would guess this was a first year male or a female.Behaviors: I observed the CAWA for about ten minutes feeding on the ground and flying into low tree branches. I got as close as 10-12 feet at one point.Call: None heardPlumage: See description below
